items.caption: A digital illustration with a background that depicts a clear blue sky with a few clouds. in the foreground, there is a diagram showing a weather radar system. the radar emits microwaves that reflect off precipitation and return to the radar to be measured. the radar is used to detect, locate, and measure the amount of precipitation within or falling from clouds. the diagram includes a representation of the radar system, a depiction of the precipitation, and a green line indicating the path of the microwaves. the text is overlaid on the image and provides a description of the function of the weather radar.
